title: Tech
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Call for speakers: TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026
items.description: Submit to speak at TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 to lead a roundtable. Share scaling insights with 1,100 founders on June 23 in Boston. Apply here.

items.title: MrBeast’s company buys Gen Z-focused fintech app Step
items.description: YouTube megastar MrBeast announced on Monday that his company, Beast Industries, is buying Step, a teen-focused banking app.

items.title: Bluesky finally adds Drafts
items.description: The move comes as Bluesky’s competitors, X and Threads, have long supported drafts.

items.title: ChatGPT rolls out ads
items.description: OpenAI faced a backlash late last year when it tested app suggestions that looked like unwanted ads. Still, the AI company needs to generate revenue f...

items.title: YouTube TV introduces cheaper bundles, including a $65/month sports package
items.description: YouTube TV is offering new, less expensive plans that can be customized around topics like sports, news and entertainment.

items.title: Uber to buy delivery arm of Turkey’s Getir
items.description: The deal will see Uber paying $335 million at the outset to purchase Getir's food delivery business. Uber will also pay $100 million for a 15% stake i...

items.title: Databricks CEO says SaaS isn’t dead, but AI will soon make it irrelevant
items.description: AI isn't going to replace major SaaS apps with vibe-coded versions, Databricks Ali Ghodsi believes. But it could give rise to competitors.

items.title: Anthropic’s India expansion collides with a local company that already had the name
items.description: India's Anthropic Software has taken the U.S. AI giant to court over a name dispute.

items.title: The battle begins: 2026 Startup Battlefield 200 nominations are open
items.description: Calling Pre-Series A founders: nominations for TechCrunch Startup Battlefield 200 are open. Compete in the world’s most iconic pitch competition at Di...

items.title: Discord to roll out age verification next month for full access to its platform
items.description: All users will be put into a "teen-appropriate experience" by default unless they prove that they are adults.
